name: FF_USER_TABLES_VL
query: SELECT B.USER_TABLE_ID, B.BASE_USER_TABLE_NAME BASE_USER_TABLE_NAME, TL.USER_TABLE_NAME USER_TABLE_NAME, TL.USER_ROW_TITLE USER_ROW_TITLE, B.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, B.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, B.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, B.RANGE_OR_MATCH, B.USER_KEY_UNITS USER_KEY_UNITS, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, B.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID FROM FF_USER_TABLES B, FF_USER_TABLES_TL TL WHERE B.USER_TABLE_ID = TL.USER_TABLE_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG') WITH CHECK OPTION
